title: Genie Space enhancements
body:
* **Reasoning traces using the API (Public Preview)**: Users can now access Genie's reasoning traces using the API through the `GenieQueryAttachments` field in the `GenieMessage` object. See [Get message](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/genie/getmessage).
* **Message comments using the API (Public Preview)**: Users can now add text comments to messages and list them using the API. See [Create message comment](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/genie/createmessagecomment).
* **Increased token limit for Agent mode (Public Preview)**: The maximum token limit for Agent mode conversations increased, improving performance and context retention across long, multi-turn interactions.
